title: 병렬 실행 안정성 — overlap gate (상시) + worktree 격리 (opt-in)
policy_note: modifies run_parallel_stage behavior (adds pre-flight gate + optional worktree wrapper); PENDING path, explicit 2차 승인 완료

fitness.rationale: overlap gate aborts on conflict (exit 1), worktree isolation is per-slice; both observable via logs and worktree dir presence

applied_changes: run-epic.sh parser: added SLICE_FILES[] tracking '- **Files:**' lines per slice, LAST_SLICE_IDX guard
run-epic.sh: check_slice_overlap() (stage, indices) — parses SLICE_FILES, tmpfile diff, detects duplicates via sort|uniq -d, prints owners, exit 1
run-epic.sh: WORKTREE_ENABLED flag from HARVEST_PARALLEL_WORKTREE=1, setup_slice_worktree() creates .harvest-wt/stage-N/slice-I + harvest-wt/{RUN_ID}/... branch, copies handoff file into worktree
run-epic.sh: finalize_slice_worktree() extracts patch via git diff --cached, applies to main tree with git apply --index, removes worktree + branch

run-epic.sh: run_parallel_stage() calls check_slice_overlap() first (return 1 if conflict), launches slices via subshell with cd to worktree when enabled, merges worktree patches + bring handoff back after batch completes
epic-guide.md: new '병렬 안전장치 (Parallel Safety)' section documenting gate + worktree opt-in + recovery procedures with ref to docs/troubleshooting.md §3

self_test_results.overlap_gate_unit_test: 3/3 cases (overlap 0,1 BLOCK; no-overlap 0,2 PASS; all-overlap BLOCK)
